column1: flow
start -> utente creato? — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="check if user created"
utente creato? -> creazione utente — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="create user if not created"
creazione utente -> creazione corretta? — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="check if user creation correct"
creazione corretta? -> home — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="go to home page if creation correct"
creazione corretta? -> creazione utente — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="retry user creation if incorrect"
flow 1: start -> utente creato? -> creazione utente -> creazione corretta? -> home
flow 2: start -> utente creato? -> creazione utente -> creazione corretta? -> creazione utente
this activity diagram models the process of accessing a system after user creation.
the main flow starts at the initial node "start," checks if a user has been created ("utente creato?"), and proceeds to create a user if necessary ("creazione utente").
after creating the user, it verifies if the creation was successful ("creazione corretta?") and navigates to the home page if so.
if the user creation fails, it retries the process.
key edge cases include the scenario where a user is already created, leading directly to the home page without further action.

flow 2: home -> accesso alla creazione? -> creazione offerta? -> creazione offerta -> creazione corretta? -> creazione corretta?
the process starts at the home page.
users can either access commission creation or offer creation.
each creation process includes a check for correctness.
there are two main paths: one for commission creation and one for offer creation.
a loop exists for checking the correctness of the created item.

flow 1: home -> accesso ad "menu"? -> accesso a profilo? -> informazioni profilo
flow 2: home -> accesso ad "menu"? -> accesso a profilo? -> accesso a guida? -> guida
this activity diagram models a menu navigation process.
the user starts at the home action.
the first decision checks for access to the menu.
if access is granted, it proceeds to check for profile access.
if profile access is granted, it displays profile information.
if profile access is denied, it checks for guide access.
if guide access is granted, it displays the guide.
if neither profile nor guide access is granted, the process ends without displaying any content.
